tasks.label: BB stop
args: pids=$(ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null | awk '/:1420 / {print $NF}' | sed -n 's/.*pid=\([0-9][0-9]*\).*/\1/p' | sort -u); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids && echo "Stopped Border Buddies dev server on port 1420."; else echo "No Border Buddies dev server found on port 1420."; fi

tasks.label: BB clean cache
args: rm -rf dist node_modules/.vite .vite target src-tauri/target && echo "Cleaned Border Buddies build and dev caches."
